# Captive Path
> An independent venture platform built to evaluate, shape, and advance selected opportunities through strategy, systems, and modern execution.

Captive Path is operated by Zach Warshawsky, an entrepreneur and operator with 20+ years of experience building technology and marketing businesses. It is not an agency, fund, or consulting firm. It is an operator-led platform that engages selectively and deeply with ventures worth building seriously.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://captivepath.com/): Overview of the platform, positioning, and what Captive Path is built for.
- [About](https://captivepath.com/about/): Background on Captive Path and its founder, Zach Warshawsky.
- [Process](https://captivepath.com/process/): How Captive Path evaluates opportunities and works with ventures — covering evaluation, strategy shaping, foundation building, and advancement.
- [Journal](https://captivepath.com/journal/): Ideas, analysis, and operating perspective on venture strategy, incubation models, and building things that matter.
- [Contact](https://captivepath.com/contact/): How to start a conversation about a venture opportunity.

## Journal Articles

- [The Framework for Evaluating Venture-Stage Ideas](https://captivepath.com/journal/the-framework-for-evaluating-venture-stage-ideas/)
- [What a Modern Incubation Model Actually Looks Like](https://captivepath.com/journal/what-a-modern-incubation-model-actually-looks-like/)
- [Systems Over Hustle: Why Infrastructure Decides Outcomes](https://captivepath.com/journal/systems-over-hustle-why-infrastructure-decides-outcomes/)

## What Captive Path Does

Captive Path provides:
- Venture opportunity evaluation
- Strategy shaping and market positioning
- Systems and operational infrastructure for early-stage ventures
- Operator-led execution support

## Who It Is For

Founders, operators, and early-stage ventures where the opportunity is real but the infrastructure, strategy, or execution capacity is the limiting factor.

## Key Entities

- Organization: Captive Path (https://captivepath.com)
- Founder: Zach Warshawsky (https://www.linkedin.com/in/zachwarshawsky/)
- Related entity: Profitable Media (co-founded by Zach Warshawsky)
